name: Pumpkin Pie Bswn00a
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend the 2 eggs with the brown sugar until well combined.
2. Add the spices (cinnamon, allspice, and ginger) to the egg mixture and stir until incorporated.
3. Mix in the canned pumpkin and milk, ensuring everything is well blended.
4. Pour the batter into a baking dish or line two pie tins with parchment paper.
5. Bake at 425°F for 40-55 minutes, or until set.
6. Makes 1 very large, deep 10-inch pie or 2 smaller 8-inch pies.
